feedback.text: I warmly welcome the Digital Fairness Act initiative and thank me for the opportunity to participate in it. I am particularly concerned about the long-term availability of digital products, in particular digital games, which are rendered inaccessible to buyers by subsequent modifications, server shutdowns or licensing problems. This practice affects many people who have legally acquired digital content but are unable to use it on a permanent basis. It also entails a loss of cultural values, as many of these works are not archived or kept accessible. In this context, I would like to politely ask to include in the Digital Fairness Act solutions that enable the fair, transparent and sustainable use of digital products, e.g. through mandatory offline modes, long-term archiving or alternative means of access when services are shut down. I would like to thank you for your work on this important initiative and I very much hope that the perspective of users working for the preservation of digital cultural goods will also be taken into account.
